Test Description: Default reset-value verification and masked write/read verification across a fixed set of 49 GPIO-related registers using address/mask arrays.
Remarks: Comments in source indicate: 'SKIPPING VRRW registers'; and a note that forcing DIN low affects level select causing default read mismatch if not handled.
Test Steps / Procedure:
Entry point: int test_case()
1) CALL chk_rst_val()
   1.1) FOR i = 0..(CNT-1) [CNT=49]:
        - addr = addr_array[i]
        - IF skip_rst_array[i] == 1: CONTINUE
        - IF read_mask_array[i] == 0x00000000: CONTINUE
        - READ: data_rd = read_reg(addr)
        - COMPUTE: data = (data_rd & 0xFFFFFFFE)
        - COMPARE: IF (data == default_value_array[i]) PASS else { def_fail_cnt++ ; PRINT failure }
2) CALL chk_rd_wr()
   2.1) DEFINE chk_val[6] = {0xFFFFFFFF, 0xAAAAAAAA, 0x55555555, 0xF5F5F5F5, 0xA5A5A5A5, 0xFFFF0000}
   2.2) FOR j = 0..5:
        - data_wr = chk_val[j]
        - WRITE PHASE: FOR i = 0..(CNT-1):
            * addr = addr_array[i]
            * IF skip_array[i] == 1: CONTINUE
            * IF write_mask_array[i] == 0x00000000: CONTINUE
            * WRITE: write_reg(addr, (data_wr & write_mask_array[i]))
        - READ/VERIFY PHASE: FOR i = 0..(CNT-1):
            * addr = addr_array[i]
            * IF skip_array[i] == 1: CONTINUE
            * IF write_mask_array[i] == 0x00000000: CONTINUE
            * IF read_mask_array[i] == 0x00000000: CONTINUE
            * READ: data_rd = (read_reg(addr) & read_mask_array[i])
            * COMPUTE: wr_n = (write_mask_array[i] ^ 0xFFFFFFFF)
            * COMPUTE: exp_val = ((data_wr & read_mask_array[i] & write_mask_array[i]) | (wr_n & read_mask_array[i] & default_value_array[i]))
            * COMPARE: IF (data_rd == exp_val) PASS else { wr_fail_cnt++ ; PRINT mismatch }
3) TERMINATE: IF (def_fail_cnt > 0 || wr_fail_cnt > 0) finish(1) else finish(0)
Timing: No active delay functions executed in main paths.
Validation / Acceptance Criteria:
- Default check: PASS when (read_reg(addr_array[i]) & 0xFFFFFFFE) == default_value_array[i] for all readable and non-skipped registers; else def_fail_cnt increments.
- Write/read check: For writable+readable and non-skipped registers, PASS when (read_reg(addr) & read_mask_array[i]) == exp_val computed as: ((data_wr & read_mask_array[i] & write_mask_array[i]) | ((write_mask_array[i] ^ 0xFFFFFFFF) & read_mask_array[i] & default_value_array[i])); else wr_fail_cnt increments.
- Overall PASS/FAIL: finish(0) only if (def_fail_cnt == 0 && wr_fail_cnt == 0); otherwise finish(1).

Test Description: Negative-edge interrupt enable and verification for GPIO[8..39]; per-pin config, group enable, generated falling edges, ISR service, and clear verification.
Remarks: Comments state: arm wait before the edge to avoid race; bounded wait (timeout) used to prevent infinite loops.
Test Steps / Procedure:
Entry point: int test_case()
1) INIT: test_err = 0
2) OPTIONAL: GIC_EnableIRQ(87) if GPIO0 defined; GIC_EnableIRQ(88) if GPIO1 defined
3) WRITE: enable sysreg interrupt
   - If GPIO0: write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1, LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1_GPIO0_INTR)
   - If GPIO1: write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1, LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1_GPIO1_INTR)
4) WRITE: Drive all pads high to known state: write_reg(0xA0243FFC, 0xFFFFFFFF)
5) FOR i = 0..31 (GPIO 8..39):
   - addr1 = MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8 + (i * 4)
   - WRITE: write_reg(addr1, (1u<<20) | (1u<<18) | (1u<<16)) // doe=1, neie=1, iclr=1
   - DELAY: wait_on(10)
6) FOR i = 0..31 (per pin):
   - wr_val = (1u << i)
   - WRITE: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_INTR_RAW_STCLR1, wr_val) // pre-clear
   - WRITE: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1, wr_val) // enable this bit only
   - DELAY: wait_on(10)
   - SET: int_pend = 1 // arm BEFORE edge
   - EDGE GEN: write_reg(0xA0243FFC, 0xFFFFFFFF); DELAY wait_on(30); then write_reg(0xA0243FFC, ~wr_val) // falling edge on bit i
   - POLL with timeout: timeout=5000; WHILE (int_pend && timeout--) { wait_on(10); }
   - IF (timeout == 0): PRINT timeout error; test_err++
7) TERMINATE: finish(test_err)

ISR entry: void Default_IRQHandler()
A) SET: local_wr = (1u << i)
B) CLEAR wait: int_pend = 0
C) WRITE: Return pads to all high: write_reg(0xA0243FFC, 0xFFFFFFFF)
D) READ: raddr = MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8 + (i * 4); rdata = read_reg(raddr)
E) CHECK DIN (negedge): IF ((rdata & 0x1) != 0) then test_err++
F) CHECK raw bit: IF ((rdata & 0x2) != 0x0) THEN
   - READ: rdata_grp = read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1)
   - CHECK group set: IF ((rdata_grp & local_wr) == 0) then test_err++
   - WRITE: per-pin clear: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8 + (i * 4), (1u<<20) | (1u<<16)) // doe=1, iclr=1
   - WRITE: group raw clear: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_INTR_RAW_STCLR1, local_wr)
   - READ: rdata_grp = read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1)
   - CHECK group cleared: IF (rdata_grp != 0x0) then test_err++
   - WRITE: If GPIO0 -> write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1, LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO0_INTR); GIC_ClearIRQ(87)
            If GPIO1 -> write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1, LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO1_INTR); GIC_ClearIRQ(88)
  ELSE: test_err++
Validation / Acceptance Criteria:
- Runtime wait: PASS path requires int_pend cleared before timeout in test loop; FAIL increments test_err when timeout == 0.
- DIN after negedge: FAIL increments test_err when ((rdata & 0x1) != 0) in ISR.
- Raw bit presence: FAIL increments test_err when ((rdata & 0x2) == 0x0); PASS path when nonzero proceeds to group checks.
- Group status set: FAIL increments test_err when ((read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1) & (1u<<i)) == 0).
- Group clear: FAIL increments test_err when post-clear read of MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1 != 0x0.
- Sysreg clear: FAIL increments test_err when respective RAW_STCR1 bit not cleared after write (checked via code flow with GIC clear).
- Overall PASS/FAIL: finish(test_err) -> PASS when test_err == 0; otherwise FAIL.

Test Description: Positive-edge interrupt enable and verification for GPIO[8..39]; per-pin config, group enable, generated rising edges, ISR service, and clear verification.
Remarks: Comments state: arm before edge; bounded wait (timeout) to avoid hangs; group masked during service.
Test Steps / Procedure:
Entry point: void test_case()
1) OPTIONAL: GIC_EnableIRQ(87) if GPIO0; GIC_EnableIRQ(88) if GPIO1
2) INIT: test_err = 0
3) WRITE: enable sysreg interrupt
   - If GPIO0: write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1, LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1_GPIO0_INTR)
   - If GPIO1: write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1, LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1_GPIO1_INTR)
4) FOR i = 0..31:
   - WRITE: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8 + (i * 4), 0x00020000) // enable posedge per-pin
5) DELAY: wait_on(10)
6) WRITE: configure input mode groups (doe=1):
   - write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_IO_CTRL_GROUP1, 0x000000FF)
   - write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_IO_CTRL_GROUP2, 0x000000FF)
   - write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_IO_CTRL_GROUP3, 0x000000FF)
   - write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_IO_CTRL_GROUP4, 0x000000FF)
7) DELAY: wait_on(10)
8) WRITE: enable group interrupts: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1, 0xFFFFFFFF)
9) FOR i = 0..31 (per pin):
   - WRITE: write_reg(0xA0243FFC, 0x00000000) // ensure low
   - DELAY: wait_on(10)
   - SET: int_pend = 1 // arm BEFORE edge
   - EDGE GEN: write_reg(0xA0243FFC, 0xFFFFFFFF) // rising edge
   - POLL with timeout: timeout=2000; WHILE ((int_pend == 1) && (--timeout > 0)) { wait_on(10); }
   - IF (timeout == 0): PRINT timeout error; test_err++; BREAK loop
   - WRITE: write_reg(0xA0243FFC, 0x00000000); DELAY: wait_on(10)
10) TERMINATE: finish(test_err)

ISR entry: void Default_IRQHandler()
A) SET: wr_val = (1 << i); int_pend = 0
B) READ: rdata_grp = read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1)
C) WRITE: mask group during service: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1, 0x00000000)
D) CHECK group presence: IF ((rdata_grp & 0xFFFFFFFF) != 0) PASS else { PRINT error; test_err++ }
E) CLEAR per-pin raw for all pins: FOR j = 0..31: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8 + (j * 4), 0x00010000)
F) DELAY: wait_on(2)
G) VERIFY group cleared: rdata_grp = read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1); IF (rdata_grp == 0x0) PASS else { PRINT error; test_err++ }
H) WRITE sysreg raw clear and READ-BACK:
   - If GPIO0: write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1, LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO0_INTR); rdata = read_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1); IF ((rdata & LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO0_INTR) != 0) then PRINT; test_err++
   - If GPIO1: write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1, LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO1_INTR); rdata = read_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1); IF ((rdata & LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO1_INTR) != 0) then PRINT; test_err++
I) WRITE: re-enable group: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1, 0xFFFFFFFF)
J) CLEAR GIC: GIC_ClearIRQ(87/88) according to GPIOx
Validation / Acceptance Criteria:
- Runtime wait: PASS path requires int_pend cleared before timeout in test loop; FAIL increments test_err when timeout == 0.
- Group interrupt presence: PASS when ((read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1) & 0xFFFFFFFF) != 0); FAIL otherwise (increments test_err).
- Group clear verification: PASS when subsequent read of MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1 equals 0x0 after per-pin clears; FAIL otherwise (increments test_err).
- Sysreg raw clear verification: PASS when respective RAW_STCR1 bit is cleared after write (checked by read-back and bit test); FAIL otherwise (increments test_err).
- Overall PASS/FAIL: finish(test_err) -> PASS when test_err == 0; otherwise FAIL.
